title: VeloraOS 1.10.23 - Full Installer TLS Staging Hotfix
releaseNotes: Fixes the full installer failing during atomic deployment because the TLS setup helper was absent from the staged installation.
Adds a hard staged-file inventory check so required deployment files cannot be missing silently.
Adds TLS helper syntax validation before any live installation files are replaced.
Preserves Public CA access, persistent TLS identity, seamless update reconnect and backend recovery.
